item.title: Box Truck Recovery at Busy Intersection
item.description: Pepe's Towing handles a box truck recovery at a busy intersection, using professional towing procedures, teamwork, and safety-focused roadside support.

media:content.media:title: Box Truck Recovery at Busy Intersection
media:content.media:description: Pepe's Towing handles a box truck recovery at a busy intersection, using professional towing procedures, teamwork, and safety-focused roadside support.

item.title: Amazon Prime Delivery Recovery
item.description: Pepe's Towing responds to a delivery vehicle recovery, using professional towing procedures, equipment, and teamwork to clear the scene safely.

media:content.media:title: Amazon Prime Delivery Recovery
media:content.media:description: Pepe's Towing responds to a delivery vehicle recovery, using professional towing procedures, equipment, and teamwork to clear the scene safely.

item.title: New Wrap Looks Great on the Tow Truck
item.description: Pepe's Towing shows off a new wrap on the tow truck, highlighting the finished look and professional presentation

media:content.media:title: New Wrap Looks Great on the Tow Truck
media:content.media:description: Pepe's Towing shows off a new wrap on the tow truck, highlighting the finished look and professional presentation

item.title: Team lifts 133,000-lb excavator for transport
item.description: @daved55 and @pistolita_88 work together to load a 133,000-lb excavator onto a trailer for transport, with thanks to @nationalrecoveryusa.

media:content.media:title: Team lifts 133,000-lb excavator for transport
media:content.media:description: @daved55 and @pistolita_88 work together to load a 133,000-lb excavator onto a trailer for transport, with thanks to @nationalrecoveryusa.
